home.title: Home
home.subtitle: A quick summary of your school's activity.

onboarding.title: Finish setting up your school
onboarding.needStudents: You still need students and invited parents to operate.
onboarding.needInvitations: Upload parents via Excel so they receive their invitation.

tiles.gradesConfigured: {count, plural, one {# grade configured} other {# grades configured}}

shortcuts.heading: Shortcuts
shortcuts.importParentsDesc: Bulk-upload parents and students with the official template.
shortcuts.addPickupPointDesc: Set the geofence and schedules for a new entrance.
shortcuts.manageGradesDesc: Add, rename, or remove the school's grades.
shortcuts.newStudentDesc: Manually add a student and link them to their parents.

pickup.subtitle: Active trips ranked by ETA. Geofence: {radius} m.

liveMap.title: Live map
liveMap.subtitle: Real-time positions of parents on the way to the school.
liveMap.loadError: Google Maps could not be loaded. Check that the API key is valid and has the Maps JavaScript API enabled.
liveMap.missingKey: Set NEXT_PUBLIC_GOOGLE_MAPS_WEB_KEY to see the map.
liveMap.noOneOnTheWay: No one is on the way right now.

arrivals.title: Live arrivals
arrivals.subtitle: Parents on the way to the school, sorted by estimated time of arrival.

table.emptyHint: When a parent taps "On my way" in the mobile app, they will show up here.

ranked.emptyTitle: No active trips at this pickup point.
ranked.emptyHint: When a parent taps "on my way" it will show up here.
